package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for string_to_byte_for_single_char_check: `[]byte(s)[0]` or `string(b) == "x"` for single-character comparisons
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario648Positive(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Index(haystack, needle) != -1
}
